summary: Iteration 15 testing complete. Both new features working perfectly: (1) ePaper scroll-based page navigation with 5 pages rendered vertically and IntersectionObserver updating toolbar counter (Pg 1/5), (2) Article modal Tinder-like swipe navigation with framer-motion animations, next/prev buttons, keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right/Escape), and progress dots. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

passed_tests: ePaper renders ALL pages vertically - verified 5 pages with data-page-index elements
ePaper toolbar shows page counter (Pg 1/5 format) that updates on scroll
ePaper sidebar thumbnail click scrolls to correct page
ePaper toolbar prev/next buttons work for navigation
Article modal opens with 1/N counter when clicking news card (1/10 shown)
Article modal next button (swipe-next-btn) advances to next article
Article modal prev button (swipe-prev-btn) appears after moving to article 2+
Article modal ArrowRight navigates to next article
Article modal ArrowLeft navigates to previous article
Article modal Escape closes the modal
Article modal shows swipe hint text: 'Swipe left/right or use arrow keys to navigate'
Article modal shows progress dots at bottom with current position highlighted
GET /api/public/news returns articles for the feed
GET /api/news/feed returns articles with required fields for modal display

article_modal_swipe.swipe_hint_text: Swipe left/right or use arrow keys to navigate
article_modal_swipe.progress_dots: Visible at bottom with current position highlighted

critical_code_review_comments: ePaper IntersectionObserver implementation is clean with proper threshold values [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7]
Article modal uses framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth enter/exit animations
Keyboard event handler properly adds/removes listeners based on modal state
SWIPE_THRESHOLD (80px) provides good balance for swipe detection
Progress dots limited to nearby articles (±3) to avoid clutter with large lists

test_credentials.guest: No login required for news feed and ePaper

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 2026-03-07 morning edition with 136 articles, 10 news articles loaded in feed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features implemented and verified: (1) ePaper page now renders all pages vertically with scroll-based navigation using IntersectionObserver to track current page. Toolbar shows 'Pg X/Y' counter. (2) Article modal now supports Tinder-like swipe with framer-motion animations. Click news card -> modal opens with 1/N counter, arrow buttons on sides, progress dots at bottom, keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft/Right/Escape), and swipe hint text. All data-testids verified: epaper-page, data-page-index, epaper-sidebar, epaper-thumb-N, article-modal, swipe-next-btn, swipe-prev-btn, modal-close-btn.
